message:
Implement page-level MVCC conflict detection and SSI cycle validation

BeginConcurrent (begin_concurrent.rs):
- Add real page-level read/write set tracking via PageReadSet and
  PageWriteSet data structures that record accessed page ranges
- Implement ConflictDetector with actual page-range overlap detection
  that checks for rw-antidependency conflicts between concurrent txns
- Build ConcurrentTransaction state machine that validates against
  concurrent commits before allowing commit to proceed

SSI validation (ssi_validation.rs):
- Overhaul conflict validation with new SsiValidator struct using
  dependency-graph-based cycle detection for dangerous structure
  detection (rw-antidependency cycles that indicate serialization
  anomalies)
- Introduce ValidationDecision enum for structured commit/abort
  decisions with evidence logging

Epoch-based reclamation (ebr.rs):
- Add EbrGuard retire/reclaim methods for safe deferred cleanup of
  transaction metadata after all concurrent readers have advanced
- Implement safe-epoch advancement logic

Supporting changes:
- Re-export new public types from mvcc lib.rs
- Adjust SSI anomaly tests to match updated validation API
- Update MVCC benchmarks for new conflict detection paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
